articles.author: Weilun Soon, Julian Lee
articles.title: Three Indian Tankers Reemerge, Pointing to Hormuz Traffic Uptick - Bloomberg
articles.description: Millions of barrels of oil continued to flow through the Strait of Hormuz this weekend even after Iran claimed to have closed the waterway again, as Washington and Tehran offer contrasting narratives over the status of the world’s most important shipping chok…
